/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,librobot_motion.so -o librobot_motion.so CMakeFiles/robot_motion.dir/cpp/src/controllers/controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/robot_motion.dir/cpp/src/controllers/joint_torque_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/robot_motion.dir/cpp/src/robot_properties/robot_properties.cpp.o CMakeFiles/robot_motion.dir/cpp/src/utils/vector_utils.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/openrobots/lib: /opt/openrobots/lib/libpinocchio_parsers.so.3.4.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liburdfdom_sensor.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liburdfdom_model_state.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liburdfdom_model.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liburdfdom_world.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.1.0 /opt/openrobots/lib/libpinocchio_collision.so.3.4.0 /opt/openrobots/lib/libpinocchio_default.so.3.4.0 /opt/openrobots/lib/libcoal.so.3.0.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_serialization.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_chrono.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liboctomap.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liboctomath.so
